• 3D Checkers game with real-time multiplayer via MQTT
  • Customizable player images and role-based camera perspectives
  • Interactive chat system and win celebration animations
    const mqttClient = mqtt.connect(brokerUrl, options);
    mqttClient.on('message', (topic, message) => { /* Handle game state */ });

A visually immersive 3D checkers game featuring real-time multiplayer gameplay over MQTT, complete with customizable player avatars, interactive chat, and dynamic win animations. The game supports role-based camera perspectives and includes special effects like explosions and sweeping celebrations.
